chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No. 418 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For orders as to non-prosecution. -------------- 11.02.2025. None present ************ Matter is pending before the office in non-prosecution since 02.07.2022 and as per office note, no one has turned up to make compliance. In view of such circumstances, this Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz
